topic: There is a grocery list on my fridge in my handwriting for food I am allergic to that I never wrote
title: There Is a Grocery List on My Fridge in My Handwriting for Food I Am Allergic To | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: There is a grocery list on my fridge in my own handwriting. Every item would kill me. I never wrote it.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a handwritten grocery list held by a magnet on a refrigerator door, dim kitchen light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I live alone. A magnet holds a notepad on the fridge door.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a small kitchen at night, a notepad magnet on the fridge, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I keep my own lists there.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a handwritten note on a fridge notepad, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One morning a new list hung there. My handwriting. Peanuts. Shellfish. Foods I am deathly allergic to.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a grocery list with peanuts and shellfish written in a shaky hand, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a crumpled list dropped into a kitchen trash can, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Next day, the same list. Crossed off, item by item.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of the same grocery list with items crossed off one by one, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of an open refrigerator interior, food items inside, dim fridge light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The crossed off foods were inside. Bought. Opened.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of opened packages of peanuts and shellfish on a fridge shelf, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each day more items are checked, and the food appears in meals I do not remember making.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a grocery list mostly crossed off, dim kitchen light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night I woke at the counter, a fork in my hand, a plate of shellfish half eaten.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a person standing at a kitchen counter at night with a fork and a half eaten plate, dim light, only a silhouette, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I unplugged the fridge and threw out every list.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an unplugged refrigerator cord on a kitchen floor, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning a new note hung there. My writing. Tonight you will not stop yourself.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a single handwritten note on a fridge reading a warning line, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing
